differential_diagnoses: Chronic lymphocytic inflammation with pontine perivascular enhancement responsive to steroids (CLIPPERS)
Primary angiitis of the central nervous system
next_steps: Brain and leptomeningeal biopsy of the involved parietal/occipital region
Comprehensive dermatologic examination to look for occult skin lesions
Whole-body PET-CT to exclude occult primary malignancy
Immunohistochemical staining of biopsy tissue for S100, SOX10, and Melan-A
Molecular analysis of biopsy tissue for GNAQ or GNA11 mutations
High-resolution contrast-enhanced MRI of the entire neuraxis including the spine
